title: The Kozuki Retainers Reveal the Truth
description: On pages 4–7, this part focuses on Unknown person #4, Unknown person #5, Orochi, Unknown person #6, Unknown person #7 as The truth of the Kozuki retainers and Wano’s time-displaced rebellion is revealed as Kaido’s power closes in.
scene: Kinemon explains the Kozuki tragedy, the twenty-year leap, and the mission to overthrow Kaido and Orochi.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #4
dialogue.text: All right...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Can any of you tell me what an isolationist country is!?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #4
dialogue.text: I can, miss!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: It's when a country closes its borders to the whole world, in order to protect its people!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #4
dialogue.text: Correct.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #4
dialogue.text: How about an open country?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #4
dialogue.text: Pick me!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #4
dialogue.text: Pick me!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: That's when a country has open borders, allowing evil people or evil ideals to flow in. It's an act of evil!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: There are many foreign countries around the world that want what we have in the Wano country.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #4
dialogue.text: ...Despite that, in the past...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: There were fools who tried to open our borders...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: It was open and his nine red scabbards!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Hey now, I didn't call on you guys for an answer.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #5
dialogue.text: gyaaaaah, it appeared!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: I don't like to hear that name, after all.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: ...As I was saying before, that occurred over 20 years ago...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: A hero appeared and was able to defeat those evil samural!!

dialogue.speaker: Orochi
dialogue.text: It was our Shogun, Kurozumi Croch!!!!!!!!

dialogue.speaker: Orochi
dialogue.text: OROCHI TWO BLADE STYLE!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #5
dialogue.text: Yaaaaa AAAH!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #5
dialogue.text: Owwww www.!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #5
dialogue.text: I got defeat- Ed!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: That's right. Those evil people all died 20 years ago...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: And that's how this country became the peaceful nation it is today.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #6
dialogue.text: -HIC-

dialogue.speaker: Orochi
dialogue.text: Lord Orochi is such a cautious man!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #6
dialogue.text: Ma- Master... Master Kyoshiro!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #6
dialogue.text: You're being too loud!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #6
dialogue.text: Shut WUUJUUP, 'You WillGoot?!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Don't be such a coward. Even if they hear me, I've only spoken the truth!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: It is said that... 20 years ago, Oden's wife stood in front of the burning castle, and said this...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #6
dialogue.text: Inenuri Kyoshiro

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: "You are like the moon who knows not of the dawn.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: If there's one ardent wish that can be fulfilled...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Then it shall be the one where nine shadows are cast, woven together through 20 years of moonlit nights.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: only then, shall you know the radiance of dawn."

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Haha!! That was just a curse made in Despera- Tion!!

dialogue.speaker: Orochi
dialogue.text: ...but Shogun Orochi deciphered it as...!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #7
dialogue.text: What did he decipher it as!?

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Oh... that's right... he said it like this....

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: "In 20 years, on a moonlit night... vengeance will come.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Nine Samural will appear... They will kill you...!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #7
dialogue.text: Aaaa why Hill

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #7
dialogue.text: And open up this country's borders!!!"

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: ...We are now in the prophesied 20th year!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: ....that's why the Shogun is scared out of his mind...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: thinking that the ghost spirits of the Kozuki family will come to kill him!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Ha ha ha ha ha ha ha ha ha ha ha ha ha ha ha ha ha ha ha ha ha ha ha ha ha ha ha ha ha ha ha ha ha ha ha ha ha ha ha ha ha ha ha ha ha ha ha ha ha ha ha ha ha ha ha ha ha ha ha ha ha ha ha

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: What could dead people possibly do to him!?

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: The Samural of the Kozuki family died 20 years ago!! They were all driven into the castle...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #7
dialogue.text: and burnt alive!! Hahahaha...

summary: This section advances the Wano Country - Kozuki Secret storyline with 52 dialogue beats. The Kozuki retainers reveal that Wano’s rebellion has been carried twenty years into the future.
